# Learning Engineering Resource Hub

> A curated referratory of learning engineering and AI-in-education resources.
> Optimized for LLM agent consumption. All entries link to externally-hosted content.
> Curation model: pre-curated, authoritative sources only — no title-only inference.

## Full index
- [All entries](llms-full.txt) — complete index, fetch this first

## Status
Index rebuilding under v2 curation policy (2026-05-01).
Previous 84-entry index available at [legacy/llms-full.txt](legacy/llms-full.txt).

## Schema & purpose
- [Schema](schema.md) — field definitions, type taxonomy, provenance flags
- [Purpose](purpose.md) — scope, audience, curation philosophy
